---
title: "Drivers and CH4"
author: "Abby Lewis"
date: "2024-08-22"
output: html_document
---

Load data and packages

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)

ch4 <- read_csv(here::here("processed_data", "L2- partitioned_and_gap_filled.csv")) %>%
  mutate(CH4_filled = CH4_filled * (60 * 60)) %>%# h instead of s
  filter(as.Date(TIMESTAMP) >= "2025-03-18",
         as.Date(TIMESTAMP) <= "2025-11-15")
```

```{r}
ch4 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = TIMESTAMP, y = Depth_cm))+
  geom_line()

ch4 %>%
  summarize(n_flooded = sum(Depth_cm > 0, na.rm = T)/sum(!is.na(Depth_cm)))
```
